title: Return Fee
description: The cost structure associated with a specific return method.

type.description: The cost structure for the return method.

amount.description: Fixed return fee charged by the merchant, represented in minor currency units (e.g., cents). Required if type is fixed_fee.

display_text.description: Human-readable text to display against the fee to provide context to the buyer (e.g., 'Restocking Fee', 'Return Shipping Label').
